name: T3.3-1440p-prores-at-display-res
description: Same writers as T3.2 but the raw screen stream is at display-points resolution (1920x1080 — what SCStream outputs when configured for points rather than native Retina pixels) and ProRes records at that size. HLS compositor upscales to 1440p (unusual in production but isolates the ProRes resolution variable from the HLS resolution variable). Tests the hypothesis that reducing raw screen capture resolution relieves IOGPU pressure. If this passes where T3.2 fails, task-4 Path B is viable.
